name: Oscar Health, Inc.
business: Oscar is a leading healthcare technology company built around a full stack technology platform and a relentless focus on member experience. It offers health plans through the ACA serving individuals, families, and employees. The company also provides health technology solutions through its +Oscar platform and brokerage services.

exposures.sentence: We offer health plans through the ACA serving individuals, families, and employees.
Oscar is a leading healthcare technology company built around a full stack technology platform and a relentless focus on member experience.
We have established a program of security measures intended to protect our computer systems from security breaches and malicious activity.

catalysts.event: Expansion to 20 states for 2026 policy year
catalysts.sentence: We have expanded our offerings to 20 states for 2026.

catalysts.event: Entry into $475.0 million secured three-year revolving credit facility
catalysts.sentence: On February 6, 2026, we entered into a $475.0 million secured three-year revolving credit facility.
